name: feature-request
description: Proposal for a new feature or template

name: needs-triage
description: Awaiting initial review by a maintainer

name: blocked
description: Cannot proceed until a dependency is resolved

name: wontfix
description: This will not be worked on

name: duplicate
description: This issue or PR already exists

name: priority:medium
description: Meaningful impact, schedule in a near-term milestone

name: priority:high
description: Urgent — blocking users or critical workflows

name: approved
description: Reviewed and approved, ready to merge

name: changes-requested
description: Reviewer has requested changes before merge

name: good-first-issue
description: Good for newcomers — small, scoped, well-described

name: help-wanted
description: Extra attention or community contribution is welcome

name: chore
description: Refactor, tech debt, dependency or tooling work
